revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-3-350

A discharge lamp in which the light is mainly produced in a metallic vapour. 

Examples are Mercury (Vapour) Lamp, Sodium (Vapour) Lamp.

Reference: C.I.E.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Metal Vapour Lamp}}
